search.query: | inputlookup cisco_dc_mso_site_details | dedup apic_host | table apic_host | eval apic_host="apic_host!=".apic_host | mvcombine apic_host | eval apic_host=mvjoin(apic_host, " AND ")
| inputlookup cisco_dc_mso_site_details | dedup mso_host | table mso_host

condition.set: eventtype="cisco_dc_aci_*" component=credentials | fields apic_host | dedup apic_host | sort 0 apic_host

search.query: | inputlookup cisco_dc_mso_site_details | search mso_host=$mso_host$ | dedup apic_host | table apic_host | eval apic_host="apic_host=".apic_host | mvcombine apic_host | eval apic_host=mvjoin(apic_host, " OR ")
| inputlookup cisco_dc_mso_site_details | dedup mso_host | table mso_host

condition.set: eventtype="cisco_dc_aci_*" component=credentials $not_search_apic_host$ | fields apic_host | dedup apic_host | sort 0 apic_host
| inputlookup cisco_dc_mso_site_details | search mso_host=$mso_host$ | dedup apic_host | table apic_host

html.p:
This dashboard provides Tenants Utilization and its components over the time period specified using the time picker.
Following drilldown capabilities are provided:
Drilldown on Ingress/Egress Utilization per Tenant chart

search.query: eventtype=cisco_dc_aci_stats component="l2IngrBytesAg15min" | search $formed_apic_host$| dedup dn | table dn,dropRate,floodRate,multicastRate,unicastRate | stats avg(dropRate), avg(floodRate), avg(multicastRate), avg(unicastRate) by dn | rename avg(dropRate) AS avg_dropRate, avg(floodRate) AS avg_floodRate, avg(multicastRate) AS avg_multicastRate, avg(unicastRate) AS avg_unicastRate | eval util = (avg_multicastRate + avg_unicastRate)| rex field=dn "uni\/tn-(?<Tenant>[^\/]+)" | stats sum(avg_dropRate) AS "Ingress Total Drop Rate",sum(avg_floodRate) AS "Ingress Total Flood Rate",sum(avg_multicastRate) AS "Ingress Total Multicast Rate",sum(avg_unicastRate) AS "Ingress Total Unicast Rate", sum(util) AS "Utilization" by Tenant | join Tenant [search `cisco_dc_aci_index` sourcetype="cisco:dc:aci:stats" component=fvCEp | dedup dn | rex field=dn "uni\/tn-(?<Tenant>[^\/]+)" | rex field=rn "\/pathep-\[(?<Interface>.*?)\]" | table Tenant,Interface ] | table Tenant,Interface,"Ingress Total Drop Rate","Ingress Total Flood Rate","Ingress Total Multicast Rate","Ingress Total Unicast Rate","Utilization" | stats sum(Utilization) AS Utilization by Tenant | join [search `cisco_dc_aci_index` sourcetype="cisco:dc:aci:class" component=l1PhysIf | dedup dn | table dn | rex field=dn "\/node-(?<id>\d*)" | table dn,id | join id [search `cisco_dc_aci_index` sourcetype="cisco:dc:aci:health" component=fabricNode role=leaf | dedup name | table name,id] | table dn,name,id | stats count(name) AS total by id | stats sum(total) AS totalInterface] | join [search `cisco_dc_aci_index` sourcetype="cisco:dc:aci:class" component=l1PhysIf | dedup dn | table dn,speed | rex field=dn "\/node-(?<id>\d*)" | eval speed = if(searchmatch("speed=inherit"),"40G",speed) |table dn,id,speed | join id [search `cisco_dc_aci_index` sourcetype="cisco:dc:aci:health" component=fabricNode role=leaf | dedup name | table name,id] | table dn,name,id,speed | rex field=speed "(?<bw>\d*)G" | eval bw=bw*1073741824 | stats sum(bw) AS totalBandwidth] | eval tIB=totalInterface*totalBandwidth | eval u=(Utilization*100)/tIB | rename u AS "Total Utilization %" Utilization AS "Ingress Utilization" | table Tenant,"Total Utilization %" | sort 0 -"Total Utilization %" | head 15

eventtype=cisco_dc_aci_stats component="l2EgrBytesAg15min" | search $formed_apic_host$ | dedup dn | table dn,multicastRate,unicastRate | stats avg(multicastRate), avg(unicastRate) by dn | rename avg(multicastRate) AS avg_multicastRate, avg(unicastRate) AS avg_unicastRate | eval util = (avg_multicastRate + avg_unicastRate)| rex field=dn "uni\/tn-(?<Tenant>[^\/]+)" | stats sum(avg_multicastRate) AS "Egress Total Multicast Rate",sum(avg_unicastRate) AS "Egress Total Unicast Rate", sum(util) AS "Utilization" by Tenant | join Tenant [search `cisco_dc_aci_index` sourcetype="cisco:dc:aci:stats" component=fvCEp | dedup dn | rex field=dn "uni\/tn-(?<Tenant>[^\/]+)" | rex field=rn "\/pathep-\[(?<Interface>.*?)\]" | table Tenant,Interface ] | table Tenant,Interface,"Egress Total Multicast Rate","Egress Total Unicast Rate","Utilization"| stats sum(Utilization) AS Utilization by Tenant | join [search `cisco_dc_aci_index` sourcetype="cisco:dc:aci:class" component=l1PhysIf | dedup dn | table dn | rex field=dn "\/node-(?<id>\d*)" | table dn,id | join id [search `cisco_dc_aci_index` sourcetype="cisco:dc:aci:health" component=fabricNode role=leaf | dedup name | table name,id] | table dn,name,id | stats count(name) AS total by id | stats sum(total) AS totalInterface] | join [search `cisco_dc_aci_index` sourcetype="cisco:dc:aci:class" component=l1PhysIf | dedup dn | table dn,speed | rex field=dn "\/node-(?<id>\d*)" | eval speed = if(searchmatch("speed=inherit"),"40G",speed) |table dn,id,speed | join id [search `cisco_dc_aci_index` sourcetype="cisco:dc:aci:health" component=fabricNode role=leaf | dedup name | table name,id] | table dn,name,id,speed | rex field=speed "(?<bw>\d*)G" | eval bw=bw*1073741824 | stats sum(bw) AS totalBandwidth] | eval tIB=totalInterface*totalBandwidth | eval u=(Utilization*100)/tIB | rename u AS "Total Utilization %" Utilization AS "Egress Utilization" | table Tenant,"Total Utilization %" | sort 0 -"Total Utilization %" | head 15

eventtype=cisco_dc_aci_stats component="l2IngrBytesAg15min"| search $formed_apic_host$ | dedup dn | table dn,dropRate,floodRate,multicastRate,unicastRate | stats avg(dropRate), avg(floodRate), avg(multicastRate), avg(unicastRate) by dn | rename avg(dropRate) AS avg_dropRate, avg(floodRate) AS avg_floodRate, avg(multicastRate) AS avg_multicastRate, avg(unicastRate) AS avg_unicastRate | eval util = (avg_multicastRate + avg_unicastRate)| rex field=dn "uni\/tn-(?<Tenant>[^\/]+)" | stats sum(avg_dropRate) AS "Ingress Total Drop Rate",sum(avg_floodRate) AS "Ingress Total Flood Rate",sum(avg_multicastRate) AS "Ingress Total Multicast Rate",sum(avg_unicastRate) AS "Ingress Total Unicast Rate", sum(util) AS "Utilization" by Tenant | join Tenant [search `cisco_dc_aci_index` sourcetype="cisco:dc:aci:stats" component=fvCEp | dedup dn | rex field=dn "uni\/tn-(?<Tenant>[^\/]+)" | rex field=rn "\/pathep-\[(?<Interface>.*?)\]" | table Tenant,Interface ] | table Tenant,Interface,"Ingress Total Drop Rate","Ingress Total Flood Rate","Ingress Total Multicast Rate","Ingress Total Unicast Rate","Utilization" | join [search `cisco_dc_aci_index` sourcetype="cisco:dc:aci:class" component=l1PhysIf | dedup dn | table dn | rex field=dn "\/node-(?<id>\d*)" | table dn,id | join id [search `cisco_dc_aci_index` sourcetype="cisco:dc:aci:health" component=fabricNode role=leaf | dedup name | table name,id] | table dn,name,id | stats count(name) AS total by id | stats sum(total) AS totalInterface] | search Tenant=$gress$ | join [search `cisco_dc_aci_index` sourcetype="cisco:dc:aci:class" component=l1PhysIf | dedup dn | table dn,speed | rex field=dn "\/node-(?<id>\d*)" | eval speed = if(searchmatch("speed=inherit"),"40G",speed) |table dn,id,speed | join id [search `cisco_dc_aci_index` sourcetype="cisco:dc:aci:health" component=fabricNode role=leaf | dedup name | table name,id] | table dn,name,id,speed | rex field=speed "(?<bw>\d*)G" | eval bw=bw*1073741824 | stats sum(bw) AS totalBandwidth] | eval tIB=totalInterface*totalBandwidth | eval u=(Utilization*100)/tIB | rename u AS "Total Utilization %" Utilization AS "Ingress Total Utilization" | table Tenant,Interface,"Ingress Total Utilization","Ingress Total Multicast Rate","Ingress Total Unicast Rate"

eventtype=cisco_dc_aci_stats component="l2EgrBytesAg15min" | search $formed_apic_host$ | dedup dn | table dn,multicastRate,unicastRate | stats avg(multicastRate), avg(unicastRate) by dn | rename avg(multicastRate) AS avg_multicastRate, avg(unicastRate) AS avg_unicastRate | eval util = (avg_multicastRate + avg_unicastRate)| rex field=dn "uni\/tn-(?<Tenant>[^\/]+)" | stats sum(avg_multicastRate) AS "Egress Total Multicast Rate",sum(avg_unicastRate) AS "Egress Total Unicast Rate", sum(util) AS "Utilization" by Tenant | join Tenant [search `cisco_dc_aci_index` sourcetype="cisco:dc:aci:stats" component=fvCEp | dedup dn | rex field=dn "uni\/tn-(?<Tenant>[^\/]+)" | rex field=rn "\/pathep-\[(?<Interface>.*?)\]" | table Tenant,Interface ] | table Tenant,Interface,"Egress Total Multicast Rate","Egress Total Unicast Rate","Utilization"| join [search `cisco_dc_aci_index` sourcetype="cisco:dc:aci:class" component=l1PhysIf | dedup dn | table dn | rex field=dn "\/node-(?<id>\d*)" | table dn,id | join id [search `cisco_dc_aci_index` sourcetype="cisco:dc:aci:health" component=fabricNode role=leaf | dedup name | table name,id] | table dn,name,id | stats count(name) AS total by id | stats sum(total) AS totalInterface] | search Tenant=$gress$ | join [search `cisco_dc_aci_index` sourcetype="cisco:dc:aci:class" component=l1PhysIf | dedup dn | table dn,speed | rex field=dn "\/node-(?<id>\d*)" | eval speed = if(searchmatch("speed=inherit"),"40G",speed) |table dn,id,speed | join id [search `cisco_dc_aci_index` sourcetype="cisco:dc:aci:health" component=fabricNode role=leaf | dedup name | table name,id] | table dn,name,id,speed | rex field=speed "(?<bw>\d*)G" | eval bw=bw*1073741824 | stats sum(bw) AS totalBandwidth] | eval tIB=totalInterface*totalBandwidth | eval u=(Utilization*100)/tIB | rename u AS "Total Utilization %" Utilization AS "Egress Total Utilization" | table Tenant,Interface,"Egress Total Utilization","Egress Total Multicast Rate","Egress Total Unicast Rate"
